items.name: Bejeweled Sword of Great Fury
items.description: Do you see red or blue?  This fierce sword lets you switch between Ruby and Sapphire attacks.  In Ruby mode you deal 40 damage per hit, but take 15 damage yourself. In Sapphire mode you do 15 damage per hit, but can strike at a great speed, and heal yourself with each hit you land.
